---
title: "Projects"
description: "Projects and experiments at the boundary of AI and cybersecurity."
listing:
  contents: projects/**/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .oc-banner {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 1rem;
          border: 1px solid rgba(76,74,152,0.25);
          border-left: 4px solid #4C4A98;
          border-radius: 12px;
          padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
          margin: 0.5rem 0 2rem 0;
          background: rgba(76,74,152,0.05);
        }
        body.quarto-dark .oc-banner {
          border-color: rgba(182,180,240,0.3);
          border-left-color: #b6b4f0;
          background: rgba(76,74,152,0.18);
        }
        .oc-banner .oc-icon { font-size: 2rem; line-height: 1; }
        .oc-banner .oc-body { flex: 1; }
        .oc-banner .oc-title {
          font-size: 1.25rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          color: #1f1f2c;
          margin: 0 0 0.2rem 0;
        }
        body.quarto-dark .oc-banner .oc-title { color: #ffffff; }
        .oc-banner .oc-desc {
          font-size: 0.95rem;
          color: #6c6c80;
          margin: 0;
        }
        body.quarto-dark .oc-banner .oc-desc { color: #b0b0c4; }
        .oc-banner .oc-cta {
          flex-shrink: 0;
          background: #4C4A98;
          color: #fff !important;
          padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem;
          border-radius: 8px;
          font-weight: 500;
          text-decoration: none;
          border-bottom: none;
          white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .oc-banner .oc-cta:hover { background: #3a3878; }
        @media (max-width: 620px) {
          .oc-banner { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
        }
      </style>
---

<div class="oc-banner">
  <div class="oc-icon">📓</div>
  <div class="oc-body">
    <p class="oc-title">Open Compilations</p>
    <p class="oc-desc">A static, OneNote-style reference notebook — physics, math, chemistry and sensor notes, each with copyable Obsidian-ready Markdown.</p>
  </div>
  <a class="oc-cta" href="open-compilations.html">Open →</a>
</div>
